{"id":"project-LICHEN-of1l","title":"Unbounded _pinned_keys dict enables memory exhaustion","description":"File: python/src/lichen/link/link_layer.py:141, 480

The _pinned_keys dict grows without bound:

    _pinned_keys: dict[bytes, bytes] = field(default_factory=dict, repr=False)
    ...
    self._pinned_keys[sender.iid] = sender.pubkey

Every new sender IID gets an entry (8-byte IID + 32-byte pubkey = 40 bytes per entry). In a long-running mesh or under attack, an adversary could send frames with many different IIDs to exhaust memory.

With MIC stub always accepting, this is trivially exploitable.

Fix: Add an LRU eviction policy or cap the dict size. Consider using a TTL-based cache.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:21:53.783289Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:21:53.783328Z"}

Every new sender IID gets an entry (8-byte IID + 32-byte pubkey = 40 bytes per entry). In a long-running mesh or under attack, an adversary could send frames with many different IIDs to exhaust memory.

With MIC stub always accepting, this is trivially exploitable.

Fix: Add an LRU eviction policy or cap the dict size. {"id":"project-LICHEN-of1l","title":"Unbounded _pinned_keys dict enables memory exhaustion","description":"File: python/src/lichen/link/link_layer.py:141, 480

The _pinned_keys dict grows without bound:

    _pinned_keys: dict[bytes, bytes] = field(default_factory=dict, repr=False)
    ...
    self._pinned_keys[sender.iid] = sender.pubkey

Every new sender IID gets an entry (8-byte IID + 32-byte pubkey = 40 bytes per entry). In a long-running mesh or under attack, an adversary could send frames with many different IIDs to exhaust memory.

With MIC stub always accepting, this is trivially exploitable.

Fix: Add an LRU eviction policy or cap the dict size. Consider using a TTL-based cache.","notes":"Commit: 8e2f6219e","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:21:53.783289Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-23T04:32:18.407766309Z","started_at":"2026-07-23T04:28:11.281469208Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-23T04:33:11.281469208Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-23T04:28:11.281469208Z"}
